ecs.taskset.scale.CfnAbout: A floating-point percentage of the desired number of tasks to place and keep running in the task set.

ecs.taskset.scale.Unit.Description: The unit of measure for the scale value.

ecs.taskset.scale.Value.Description: The value, specified as a percent total of a service's `desiredCount`, to scale the task set. Accepted values are numbers between 0 and 100.
